.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(27, 29, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(31, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(27, 29, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(31, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #353A42 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#353A42, color-mix(in srgb, #353A42 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #353A42 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#353A42, color-mix(in srgb, #353A42 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(31, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(31, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(120, 113, 108, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(31, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(27, 29, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(27, 29, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(31, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(27, 29, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(49, 79, 82) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(31, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(31, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(173, 81, 76, 0.267) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(31, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(31, 33, 34) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
